Package com.wip.repository

Interface AppUserRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<AppUser,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<AppUser,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<AppUser,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<AppUser,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<AppUser,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<AppUser>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<AppUser,Long>
public interface AppUserRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<AppUser,Long>
Spring Data JPA repository for AppUser entity persistence operations.

Extends JpaRepository to inherit standard CRUD and pagination operations on the users table. Additionally exposes custom finder methods for retrieving users by username or email, and existence checks used during user registration to prevent duplicate accounts.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • findByUsername

      Optional<AppUser> findByUsername(String username)
      Retrieves an AppUser by their unique username.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to search for
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the matching user, or empty if not found

    • existsByUsername

      boolean existsByUsername(String username)
      Checks whether an AppUser with the given username already exists.

      Used during registration to enforce username uniqueness before attempting to persist a new user record.

      Parameters:
      username - the username to check for existence
      Returns:
      true if a user with the given username exists; false otherwise

    • existsByEmail

      boolean existsByEmail(String email)
      Checks whether an AppUser with the given email address already exists.

      Used during registration to enforce email uniqueness before attempting to persist a new user record.

      Parameters:
      email - the email address to check for existence
      Returns:
      true if a user with the given email exists; false otherwise

    • findByEmail

      Optional<AppUser> findByEmail(String email)
      Retrieves an AppUser by their unique email address.
      Parameters:
      email - the email address to search for
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the matching user, or empty if not found
